description: llama.cpp router inference metrics (direct scrape) and LiteLLM client-visible latency for requests routed to llama-server.

panels.description: Last completed request prefill speed (llamacpp:prompt_tokens_seconds). Resets on pod restart.

targets.expr: max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:prompt_tokens_seconds{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})

panels.title: Prefill tok/s

panels.description: Last completed request decode speed (llamacpp:predicted_tokens_seconds).

targets.expr: max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:predicted_tokens_seconds{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})

panels.title: Decode tok/s

panels.description: requests_processing and requests_deferred. Deferred > 0 means all parallel slots are busy.

targets.expr: max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:requests_processing{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})
max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:requests_deferred{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})

panels.title: Active / deferred

panels.description: Largest n_tokens observed (llamacpp:n_tokens_max).

targets.expr: max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:n_tokens_max{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})

panels.title: Context high watermark

panels.description: Prefill and decode speed from the most recent completed request per model.

targets.expr: max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:prompt_tokens_seconds{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})
max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:predicted_tokens_seconds{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})

panels.title: Last-request throughput

panels.description: Client-visible time to first token via LiteLLM (litellm_llm_api_time_to_first_token_metric).

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (model, le) (rate(litellm_llm_api_time_to_first_token_metric_bucket{model=~"$model"}[5m])))

panels.title: TTFT p50

panels.description: Successful LiteLLM responses routed to llama-server.

targets.expr: sum by (requested_model) (rate(litellm_deployment_success_responses_total{api_base=~".*llama-server.*", requested_model=~"$model"}[5m]))

panels.title: Request rate

panels.description: LiteLLM failed API calls for llama-server models.

targets.expr: sum by (model) (rate(litellm_llm_api_failed_requests_metric_total{model=~"$model"}[5m]))

panels.title: Failed req/s

panels.description: End-to-end LiteLLM API latency for llama-server models.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (model, le) (rate(litellm_llm_api_latency_metric_bucket{model=~"$model"}[5m])))

panels.title: Latency p50

panels.description: LiteLLM TTFT histogram quantiles per model.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (model, le) (rate(litellm_llm_api_time_to_first_token_metric_bucket{model=~"$model"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.9, sum by (model, le) (rate(litellm_llm_api_time_to_first_token_metric_bucket{model=~"$model"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (model, le) (rate(litellm_llm_api_time_to_first_token_metric_bucket{model=~"$model"}[5m])))

panels.title: Time to first token

panels.description: LiteLLM API latency histogram quantiles (includes streaming decode).

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (model, le) (rate(litellm_llm_api_latency_metric_bucket{model=~"$model"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.9, sum by (model, le) (rate(litellm_llm_api_latency_metric_bucket{model=~"$model"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (model, le) (rate(litellm_llm_api_latency_metric_bucket{model=~"$model"}[5m])))

panels.title: End-to-end latency

panels.description: Successful and failed LiteLLM requests to llama-server.

targets.expr: sum by (requested_model) (rate(litellm_deployment_success_responses_total{api_base=~".*llama-server.*", requested_model=~"$model"}[5m]))
sum by (model) (rate(litellm_llm_api_failed_requests_metric_total{model=~"$model"}[5m]))

panels.title: Request rate

panels.description: Counter-derived average throughput; smoother than last-request gauges.

targets.expr: max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (rate(llamacpp:prompt_tokens_total{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"}[5m]) / rate(llamacpp:prompt_seconds_total{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"}[5m]))

max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (rate(llamacpp:tokens_predicted_total{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"}[5m]) / rate(llamacpp:tokens_predicted_seconds_total{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"}[5m]))

panels.title: Rolling 5m tok/s

panels.description: llamacpp:n_decode_total rate and n_busy_slots_per_decode.

targets.expr: max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (rate(llamacpp:n_decode_total{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"}[5m]))
max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:n_busy_slots_per_decode{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})

panels.title: Decode pressure

panels.description: llamacpp:n_tokens_max over time per model.

targets.expr: max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:n_tokens_max{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})

panels.title: Context high watermark

panels.description: llamacpp:n_busy_slots_per_decode.

targets.expr: max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:n_busy_slots_per_decode{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})

panels.title: Busy slots per decode

panels.description: requests_processing and requests_deferred over time.

targets.expr: max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:requests_processing{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})
max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:requests_deferred{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})

panels.title: Request queue

panels.description: prompt_tokens_total and tokens_predicted_total since process start.

targets.expr: max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:prompt_tokens_total{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})
max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:tokens_predicted_total{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})

panels.title: Token totals

panels.description: prompt_seconds_total and tokens_predicted_seconds_total.

targets.expr: max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:prompt_seconds_total{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})
max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:tokens_predicted_seconds_total{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})

panels.title: Processing time totals

panels.description: n_decode_total — llama_decode() invocations since process start.

targets.expr: max without(endpoint, instance, pod, prometheus, container) (llamacpp:n_decode_total{namespace="ai", service="llama-server", model=~"$model"})

panels.title: Decode calls

panels.description: up for llama-server ServiceMonitor targets (one per ?model= scrape).

targets.expr: max by (endpoint, model) (up{namespace="ai", service="llama-server"})

panels.title: Prometheus scrape

panels.description: GPU utilization percent. On our single-GPU node this is effectively llama.cpp's share.

targets.expr: node_drm_gpu_busy_percent

panels.title: GPU utilization

panels.description: VRAM used vs total. The R9700 has 32 GiB.

targets.expr: node_drm_memory_vram_used_bytes
node_drm_memory_vram_size_bytes

panels.title: VRAM

panels.description: GPU temperature, Celsius.

targets.expr: node_hwmon_temp_celsius and on (chip, instance) node_hwmon_chip_names{chip_name="amdgpu"}

panels.title: GPU temperature

title: llama-server
